name: Memory of an Adversary
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>好敵手</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>とも</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>記</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>憶</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When an opponent's monster declares an attack: You take damage equal to the attacking monster's ATK, and if you do, banish that monster. During the End Phase of your opponent's next turn, Special Summon that monster to your side of the field.
eff: When an opponent's monster declares an attack: You take damage equal to the attacking monster's ATK, and if you do, banish that monster. During the End Phase of your opponent's next turn, Special Summon that monster to your side of the field.

sets.set: Battle Pack 2: War of the Giants

summoning: Special Summons the opponent's banished monsters to the player's field
Special Summons the player's banished monsters
